ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Lime, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw

ingredients_text: 21% water, 13% Sjalot, 12% rode peper*, 12% citroengras*, *10% zout, 9.5% knoflook8% korianderzaad"; 7% laos, 5% limoenblad*, 2% komijnzaad*, 0.5% conserveermiddel (citroenzuur)("van biologische oorsprong).
